creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Today I managed to install math/fricas on FreeBSD 9.0-CURRENT/amd64.

Installation still fails with following error on ALL(!) FreeBSD 
8.2-PRE/amd64 boxes we have around here (all SMP, RAM >= 8GB, if of 
interest).

Re-installation of sbcl and all of sbcl's dependencies via portmaster -f 
lang/sbcl doesn't chance anything.

gmake[3]: Entering directory 
`/usr/ports/math/fricas/work/fricas-1.1.1/src/boot'
